overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a high-fidelity video game showing an armored hunter character exploring a lush jungle environment. The character walks along a forested riverbank before entering the water and swimming through a narrow canyon toward a massive waterfall in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest riverbank toward the water's edge, passing massive trees and dense undergrowth

entered.detail: massive tree trunk with thick buttress roots visible across the river
calm deep blue water reflecting the jungle canopy
dirt and rock path covered in moss and small plants
thick tree cover filtering sunlight into green-tinted rays
thick vines draping from tree branches overhead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path beside a calm blue river in a dense jungle. Towering ancient trees and thick canopy dominate the scene, with sunlight filtering through to create a dappled lighting effect on the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: jungle river canyon leading to waterfall

events.description: character enters the river and transitions from walking to swimming
massive waterfall becomes visible through the canyon opening ahead

agents.ego_description: swimming through the river canyon toward the distant waterfall, creating ripples and splashes in the water

notable_agents.action: small white cat-like Palico companion running along the riverbank parallel to the swimmer

entered.detail: steep moss-covered rock walls lining the left side of the river
steep moss-covered rock walls lining the right side of the river
large cascading waterfall with mist rising from the base, visible through the canyon exit
submerged and floating logs in the water near the canyon walls

segments.scene_description: The character enters the water and swims through a narrow river canyon with steep rocky walls covered in vegetation. A small white companion creature runs along the left bank, and ahead, a massive waterfall becomes visible through the canyon opening, creating mist that catches the sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded jungle path that opens into a sun-drenched river canyon. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt path beside a calm blue river, where towering ancient trees create a dappled lighting effect beneath a thick canopy. As the character leaves the shore and enters the water, the environment shifts into a narrow canyon defined by steep, vegetation-covered rocky walls. The scene then expands as a small white companion creature runs along the bank, while the camera pushes forward toward a massive waterfall visible through the canyon opening. Finally, the view culminates in a spray of mist that catches the sunlight as the character swims toward the distant falls.
